overview.overview: 今日技术热点集中在AI智能体与本地化部署的深化，字节跳动开源长时任务超级智能体、Mistral峰会动态及大模型工作记忆研究均指向AI自主性的提升；同时，跨平台开发框架（React Native）与游戏引擎（Godot）保持稳定演进，而体素渲染等复古技术也引发关注。
hot_trends: 本地化大模型部署工具
跨平台开发与游戏引擎

items.title: Unlocking the Working Memory of Large Language Models for Latent Reasoning
items.description: To improve the reasoning capabilities of large language models, test-time compute is typically scaled by generating intermediate tokens before the final answer. However, this couples reasoning to autoregressive generation and thereby conflates internal computation with external communication. In contrast, human cognition can use working memory to hold and manipulate information internally without the need to externalize intermediate thoughts. Drawing on this principle, we introduce Reasoning in
items.cn_summary: 解锁大语言模型工作记忆实现潜在推理

items.title: REST3D: Reconstructing Physically Stable 3D Scenes from a Single Image
items.description: Reconstructing physically stable 3D scenes from a single RGB image enables casual images to be converted into simulation-ready digital assets for applications such as immersive interaction and content creation. However, existing single-image reconstruction methods fall short in capturing the physical structure of a scene. As a result, they often produce geometrically plausible but physically inconsistent results, including object floating and penetration, which lead to unstable behavior in physi
items.cn_summary: 从单张图像重建物理稳定的3D场景
